theme: 那些精美绝伦的指环王二创，15张特写海报风格

items.title: 魔戒映瞳
items.description: 佛罗多近距离凝视至尊魔戒，金光照进瞳孔，命运与诱惑同时落在脸上。
items.prompt: masterpiece fanmade poster illustration inspired by The Lord of the Rings, extreme close-up portrait of Frodo Baggins holding the One Ring near his face, the gold ring reflecting inside his wide eyes, delicate hobbit features, worn travel cloak, subtle dirt and sweat, dark blurred Mordor-like background, cinematic gold and shadow lighting, highly detailed skin texture, emotional expression, collector-grade fantasy poster, no readable text, no logos

items.title: 灰袍燃灯
items.description: 甘道夫半身特写站在暗处，法杖与提灯交出两重微光，像暴风雨前最后的秩序。

items.title: 王者前夜
items.description: 阿拉贡尚未加冕，发丝湿冷，手扶安都瑞尔，脸上是克制而沉重的王者感。

items.title: 林地银光

items.title: 暮色泪光

items.title: 镜中威压
items.description: 凯兰崔尔正面近景，双目发亮，像在静止中把神性与危险同时推到极限。

items.title: 咕噜低语

items.title: 熔金之眼
items.description: 索伦之眼不做大全景，只做压迫到屏幕外的近景，让火焰像一只活体瞳孔。

items.title: 黑袍王者

items.title: 无名者之怒

items.title: 守护微光

items.title: 终章圣物
